_note: Vine-boom / deep-thud kind. Aliased to the seeded impact library (the cannon/explosion samples are credible Vine-boom stand-ins) via relative '../impact/' paths so punchline SFX work immediately without a separate download. To use a dedicated CC0 Vine-boom re-creation instead (recommended — see concepts/sfx-cue-taxonomy-2026-06), drop the file(s) into this folder and add them as entries here; own-folder files take priority. Do NOT rip the copyrighted original.
